ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Manufacturing date of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the question is related to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the rating is for */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of the rating */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Primary category indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_questions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "ask_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "question_status" TEXT /* Status of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_answers" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was given */,
  "answer_status" TEXT /* Status of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)
column_names: Reference to the category the product belongs to
Reference to the product the question is related to
Reference to the product the rating is for
Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer)
